channel.title: DoThis Training Library
channel.description: Evidence-informed workout plans and practical training guides from DoThis.

item.title: Beginner Gym Workout Plan: A Complete 3-Day Routine
item.description: A practical three-day beginner gym plan with exact exercises, sets, reps, rest, substitutions, weekly scheduling, and progression rules.

item.title: Full-Body Dumbbell Workout for Home or the Gym
item.description: A full-body dumbbell workout with two alternating sessions, precise sets and reps, home-friendly substitutions, and simple progression.

item.title: Upper/Lower Workout Split: Schedule, Exercises, and Progression
item.description: A four-day upper/lower split with exact workouts, weekly scheduling, alternatives, volume guidance, and a clear double-progression method.

item.title: Push Pull Legs Routine: Beginner and Intermediate Plans
item.description: A practical push pull legs routine with three-day and six-day schedules, complete workouts, progression, substitutions, and recovery guidance.

item.title: Strength Training for Weight Loss Without Losing Muscle
item.description: A strength plan for fat loss that prioritizes muscle retention, manageable training volume, sensible progression, protein, and recovery.

item.title: Body Recomposition Workout Plan and Weekly Schedule
item.description: A four-day body recomposition workout plan with exact exercises, progression, cardio placement, protein context, and recovery guidance.

item.title: Progressive Overload: When to Add Weight, Reps, or Sets
item.description: A practical progressive overload guide that explains when to add weight, repetitions, sets, range of motion, or simply repeat a performance.

item.title: 30-Minute Workout Plan for Busy Professionals
item.description: A practical three-day, 30-minute strength plan with exact timing, exercises, alternatives, progression, and rules for missed workouts.

item.title: Volleyball Strength and Conditioning Workout
item.description: A volleyball strength and conditioning plan with jump dosage, upper-body power, unilateral strength, weekly placement, and in-season modifications.

item.title: Knee-Friendly Lower-Body Workout and Exercise Alternatives
item.description: A conservative lower-body strength template with adjustable ranges, knee-friendly alternatives, progression rules, and clear limits for pain or injury.
